data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of machine credentials scoped to one installation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having machine credentials scoped to one installation. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that such credentials are being created or utilized in the booking process. The linked use case mentions the need for machine credentials but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of machine credentials being created or used.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and usage of machine credentials scoped to one installation.
